title: Harmful Heights
description: You start off small, growing larger when taking damage. Now you move faster, reach farther away, mine larger areas, and more
body:
[//]: <> (if you can figure out how to remove the spacing before the "Config options!" bullet point, would be wonderful) ## Harmful Heights #### *(Requires [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui))*

Features: - You start off small. - Take damage to grow larger. - Growing will break blocks directly around you if you can't move. - Your size will remain if you die. - The bigger you are... * ...the faster you move! * ...the further you can reach! * ...the more blocks you can mine! * And more! - Config options! - Taking damage makes you grow (true by default) - Starting size (0.1 by default) - Size change amount when taking damage (0.1 by default) - Max size (8 by default) - Break surrounding blocks when growing (true by default)
